intent: Sweep fixture (MIN) for 1s_2br_wd_side_split_baths_cl_gr -- 11x9 m lot, 35 m2 buildable floor (5 m buildable depth). This is the shallow-depth end of the wide 2BR clustered-baths program: the ld sibling (1s_2br_wd_side_split_baths_cl_ld) needs >=5.5 m buildable depth for its living/dining/kitchen split and can't reach this size, so gr (combined great_room) is the topology to use here. Same lot as its briefs/test/ canonical brief.
